build.buildCommand: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --no-audit --no-fund && pnpm run predeploy && pnpm run build --workspace artifacts/api-server && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=artifacts/api-server/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=artifacts/api-server/prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm run build --workspace artifacts/nextrade && pnpm run build --workspace artifacts/admin-portal
